title: Write scout/docs/api.md (stable /api contract)
userStory: As the engineer re-homing scout's UI, I want scout's HTTP API documented as a stable contract so that the new PWA builds against a defined surface instead of reverse-engineering handlers.
acceptanceCriteria: scout/docs/api.md exists and documents every route registered in internal/web/server.go Handler(): page+health, read/triage, control surface, brain profile, outreach, editor
Each route lists method(s), path, and purpose; capability gating is documented (control surface + editor 503 when Runner is nil; scoring/outreach need ANTHROPIC_API_KEY)
Special transports are noted: /api/jobs/{id}/stream is SSE, /api/ingest is multipart, GET / serves the UI
A 'notes for the PWA re-home' section states the backend renders no app HTML except GET /, brain reads route through scout's proxy, and identity comes from X-Auth-Request-Email
Cross-links to north-star.md and operations.md resolve; the doc names internal/web/server.go as source of truth
[Verification] Diff the documented route list against the mux.HandleFunc calls in server.go — every handler is represented, none invented
